name: escuela-dibujo-manager
description: Gestor para Escuela de Dibujo — arrancar frontend y backend juntos

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "blue,green" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:init
scripts.db:init: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npm run db:seed
